title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup present if Charge Case is on outdated FW
scenario: "Case Update Needed" card on Home Screen is dismissible and does not reappear after app restart when earbuds firmware is updated via app but case firmware remains outdated
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds and charge case are on outdated firmware.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Update the earbuds via the app (e.g., via Device Settings → Firmware Update).
5. Observe the Home screen for a "Case Update Needed" card.
6. Tap the "Case Update Needed" card to dismiss it.
7. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Observe the Home screen after restart.
expected: After tapping the "Case Update Needed" card, it is dismissed. After restarting the app, the card does not reappear on the Home screen.
